  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  This is a C++ XML library, used for databases/cego and probably
  other applications
  
  Many more details are available at:
  
  WWW: http://www.lemke-it.com/
  
  PR:             ports/147820
  Submitted by:   Kurt Jaeger <fbsd-ports at opsec.eu>
  Feature safe:   yes
